name: Spinach Raita- Palak Raita
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the spinach and cook very quickly in a saucepan until wilted, with just the moisture remaining on the leaves and a little salt.
2. Immediately plunge the spinach into cold water to preserve the bright green color.
3. Drain well, then chop finely.
4. Stir in the yogurt, black pepper, and seeded chili cut into very fine rings.
5. Turn into a serving bowl and, just before serving, sprinkle with the cayenne pepper.
